esv_version: My help comes from the LORD, who made heaven and earth.
niv_version: My help comes from the LORD, the Maker of heaven and earth.
reflection: When you need help, God is right there. He made the whole big world, yet He cares about your little needs. You can always ask Him.
live_it_out:
1. When something feels hard, say "God, please help me."
2. Look up at the sky and remember He made it all.
3. Thank Him for being your helper today.

esv_version: You shall love the LORD your God with all your heart.
niv_version: Love the LORD your God with all your heart.
reflection: God wants your whole heart to love Him. It’s the best kind of love—big, happy, and true. He loves you the same way.
live_it_out:
1. Tell God "I love You" with a big smile.
2. Draw a heart and write "God" inside it.
3. Show love to Him by obeying with joy.

esv_version: The LORD is my light and my salvation; whom shall I fear?
niv_version: The LORD is my light and my salvation—whom shall I fear?
reflection: God is like a bright light that chases away the dark. Because He is with you, you don’t have to be afraid of anything.
live_it_out:
1. Turn on a light and say "God is my light!"
2. When scared, remember He saves you.
3. Share this good news with a friend.

esv_version: You keep him in perfect peace whose mind is stayed on you.
niv_version: You will keep in perfect peace those whose minds are steadfast, because they trust in you.
reflection: When you think about God, He gives you a peaceful heart. It feels calm and safe, like a warm blanket.
live_it_out:
1. Close your eyes and think about God for a minute.
2. Take a slow breath and feel His peace.
3. Tell someone how God makes you peaceful.

esv_version: Turn away from evil and do good.
niv_version: Turn from evil and do good.
reflection: God shows you the happy way—choose good things. It makes your day brighter and your heart lighter.
live_it_out:
1. Choose kind words instead of mean ones.
2. Do one good thing for someone today.
3. Ask God to help you pick good.

esv_version: God is love.
niv_version: God is love.
reflection: God isn’t just loving—He IS love. Every hug, every smile, every good thing comes from Him.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God is love" three times today.
2. Give a loving hug to someone.
3. Look for God’s love in little things.

esv_version: For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you.
niv_version: For he will command his angels concerning you to guard you in all your ways.
reflection: God sends His angels to watch over you. You are never alone—He keeps you safe every step.
live_it_out:
1. Whisper "Thank You for Your angels, God."
2. Feel safe when you walk or play.
3. Draw a picture of God protecting you.

esv_version: In all your ways acknowledge him, and he will make straight your paths.
niv_version: In all your ways submit to him, and he will make your paths straight.
reflection: When you remember God in everything you do, He helps your day go smoothly. He guides you gently.
live_it_out:
1. Before you start something, say "God, help me."
2. Follow the kind path He shows.
3. Thank Him when things go well.

esv_version: But seek first the kingdom of God.
niv_version: But seek first his kingdom and his righteousness.
reflection: Put God first and everything else falls into place. He takes care of the rest with love.
live_it_out:
1. Start your morning thinking of God.
2. Put a Bible verse before playtime.
3. Trust Him to handle the day.

esv_version: I have stored up your word in my heart.
niv_version: I have hidden your word in my heart.
reflection: Keeping God’s words in your heart is like hiding treasure. It helps you every day.
live_it_out:
1. Learn today’s verse by heart.
2. Say it quietly to yourself.
3. Feel happy that God’s word is inside you.

esv_version: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace.
niv_version: May the God of hope fill you with all joy and peace.
reflection: God fills your heart with hope, joy, and peace. It’s like a special present every day.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God to fill you with joy today.
2. Share a smile with someone.
3. Say "Thank You for hope, God."

esv_version: You make known to me the path of life.
niv_version: You make known to me the path of life.
reflection: God shows you the best way to live—full of life and happiness. He walks with you.
live_it_out:
1. Ask God to show you His good path.
2. Follow one kind thing today.
3. Thank Him for guiding you.

esv_version: Casting all your anxieties on him, because he cares for you.
niv_version: Cast all your anxiety on him because he cares for you.
reflection: You can give all your worries to God. He cares so much about you and wants to carry them.
live_it_out:
1. Tell God your worries like handing Him a note.
2. Feel lighter because He cares.
3. Hug yourself and say "God cares."

esv_version: For God so loved the world, that he gave his only Son.
niv_version: For God so loved the world that he gave his one and only Son.
reflection: God loved the whole world so much He gave Jesus. That includes you—He loves you that much!
live_it_out:
1. Say "God loves me so much" today.
2. Draw a heart with Jesus inside.
3. Share God’s love with a friend.

esv_version: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
reflection: God is so good, and saying thank you makes your heart happy. He loves your thank-yous.
live_it_out:
1. Say thank you to God for one good thing.
2. Tell a family member you’re thankful.
3. Smile while you thank Him.

esv_version: A soft answer turns away wrath.
niv_version: A gentle answer turns away wrath.
reflection: Gentle words can stop angry feelings. God helps you speak softly and kindly.
live_it_out:
1. Use a soft voice when someone is upset.
2. Say something kind instead of mad.
3. Ask God to help your words be gentle.

esv_version: Even there your hand shall lead me.
niv_version: Even there your hand will guide me.
reflection: No matter where you go, God’s hand is holding yours. He leads you with love.
live_it_out:
1. Hold your hand out like God is holding it.
2. Remember He guides you everywhere.
3. Say "Lead me, God" before you go.

esv_version: Children, obey your parents in the Lord.
niv_version: Children, obey your parents in the Lord.
reflection: Obeying mom and dad is a way to please God. It makes home happy and peaceful.
live_it_out:
1. Listen and obey the first time.
2. Do a chore with a happy heart.
3. Tell God you want to obey.

esv_version: Let the words of my mouth and the meditation of my heart be acceptable in your sight.
niv_version: May these words of my mouth and this meditation of my heart be pleasing in your sight.
reflection: God listens to your words and thoughts. He smiles when they are kind and true.
live_it_out:
1. Think nice thoughts about others.
2. Say only good words today.
3. Ask God to make your heart pleasing.

esv_version: Come to me, all who labor and are heavy laden, and I will give you rest.
niv_version: Come to me, all you who are weary and burdened, and I will give you rest.
reflection: When you feel tired or worried, Jesus says come to Him. He gives the best rest.
live_it_out:
1. Tell Jesus when you feel tired.
2. Sit quietly with Him for a minute.
3. Feel His gentle rest in your heart.

esv_version: In God, whose word I praise—in God I trust.
niv_version: In God, whose word I praise—in God I trust.
reflection: You can trust God completely. His words are true and He never lets you down.
live_it_out:
1. Say "I trust You, God" out loud.
2. Praise God for His good words.
3. Choose trust instead of worry.

esv_version: Let us not grow weary of doing good.
niv_version: Let us not become weary in doing good.
reflection: Keep doing good things even when it’s hard. God sees and it makes Him happy.
live_it_out:
1. Do one good thing even if you’re tired.
2. Keep helping with a smile.
3. Ask God for strength to keep going.

esv_version: I will fear no evil, for you are with me.
niv_version: I will fear no evil, for you are with me.
reflection: Even in scary times, God is right beside you. His presence makes you brave.
live_it_out:
1. Say "You are with me" when afraid.
2. Hold onto God’s promise.
3. Tell a friend God is near.

esv_version: Let all that you do be done in love.
niv_version: Do everything in love.
reflection: Everything you do can be filled with love. It makes ordinary things beautiful.
live_it_out:
1. Do your tasks with love today.
2. Help someone because you love them.
3. Ask God to fill your day with love.

esv_version: Oh give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
niv_version: Give thanks to the LORD, for he is good.
reflection: Thanking God for His goodness is like sunshine for your heart. It never gets old.
live_it_out:
1. Count three good things from God.
2. Say thank you at every meal.
3. Share your thankfulness with family.

esv_version: Do all things without grumbling.
niv_version: Do everything without grumbling or arguing.
reflection: Doing things happily instead of complaining makes God and everyone smile.
live_it_out:
1. Do chores without complaining.
2. Turn a grumble into a thank you.
3. Ask God to help you have a happy heart.

esv_version: Behold, how good and pleasant it is when brothers and sisters dwell in unity!
niv_version: How good and pleasant it is when God’s people live together in unity.
reflection: It feels so nice when everyone gets along. God loves when families and friends live in peace.
live_it_out:
1. Play nicely with your brothers or sisters.
2. Say sorry quickly if you argue.
3. Thank God for your family.

esv_version: God loves a cheerful giver.
niv_version: God loves a cheerful giver.
reflection: When you give with a happy heart, God is extra pleased. Giving makes joy grow bigger.
live_it_out:
1. Give something small with a big smile.
2. Help without being asked.
3. Feel the happiness of giving.

esv_version: Commit your way to the LORD.
niv_version: Commit your way to the LORD.
reflection: Tell God your plans and let Him help. He makes your day even better than you imagined.
live_it_out:
1. Say "God, I give my day to You."
2. Ask Him to guide your steps.
3. Trust Him with what happens.

esv_version: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
niv_version: Jesus Christ is the same yesterday and today and forever.
reflection: Jesus never changes. His love for you stays steady every single day. You can count on Him.
live_it_out:
1. Remember Jesus is always the same.
2. Tell Him you’re glad He never changes.
3. Feel safe because He is forever.

esv_version: He will quiet you by his love.
niv_version: He will quiet you with his love.
reflection: God’s love can calm your heart like a gentle lullaby. He sings over you with joy.
live_it_out:
1. When you feel upset, remember His quiet love.
2. Take a deep breath and feel Him near.
3. Say "Thank You for loving me, God."
